title: Mexnean

{{Quote|…I'd still like to see her brought to justice. Besides, I'd like to get back the 350 credits she stole from me.|General Airen Cracken|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Mexnean''' was a [[Berrite]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] and thief.<ref name="WBC" />

She frequented [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]], [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]], and any other location where she could be assured of finding a mark for her con games. Her criminal activities included laundering money for [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], running fixed [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] games, and many other lucrative scams. One of her trademark schemes was to run up extravagant expenses while claiming to be employed by a corporation or [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], charge them to her supposed employer, and disappear. Even [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], the head of the [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] and later the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic's]] intelligence services, lost [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to one of Mexnean's scams.<ref name="WBC" />

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Mexnean had accumulated enough charges against her that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] could have sent her to prison for decades. However, the Republic was willing to drop some of the charges if she were brought in for questioning, and if she agreed to give up information about some of the crime lords she had recently had business with. General Cracken posted a 1,500 credit reward for her capture.<ref name="WBC" />

Though Berrites were often stereotyped as dim-witted and slow, Mexnean was an accomplished con artist and an expert pick-pocket. She was also familiar with a wide range of languages, cultures, alien species, and criminal organizations. She tended to wear expensive cloaks and arm herself with a [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] pistol.<ref name="WBC" />
